name: @typeagent/explore-bench
description: GitHub Copilot SDK and direct TypeAgent SWE-bench localization benchmark
author: Microsoft

scripts.prettier: prettier --check README.md package.json tsconfig.json examples scripts src test --ignore-path ../../.prettierignore
scripts.prettier:fix: prettier --write README.md package.json tsconfig.json examples scripts src test --ignore-path ../../.prettierignore
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/test/*.spec.js scripts/*.test.mjs
